description_long: This storage box features a robust, industrial design with a square frame reinforced by metallic corner brackets and large bolts. The main body is constructed from reddish-brown wooden planks, which are slightly uneven and stacked horizontally, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The metallic frame is painted a light gray and provides structural support, with prominent rivets at each corner for added durability. The box appears to be open at the top, with no visible lid or closure mechanism, making it suitable for quick access and storage of various items. Its sturdy build suggests it is designed for heavy-duty use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites. The overall aesthetic is functional and industrial, with a focus on strength and practicality.
description: A rugged, square storage box with a light gray metal frame and reddish-brown wooden planks, reinforced by large corner bolts. The open-top design and sturdy construction make it ideal for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal frame, large corner bolts, and uneven horizontal wooden planks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same metal frame and wooden planks, with a slightly different plank alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible bolts and the same rugged wooden plank arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the metal frame and wooden planks, with a clear view of the plank seams.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, workshop, construction site, stackable
